title: The Irresistible Lover
writer: Evelyn Campbell, Albert DeMond, Edward Ludwig
actors: Norman Kerry, Lois Moran, Gertrude Astor
plot: J. Harrison Gray, a wealthy playboy and notorious womanizer, finally decides to find the "right" girl and settle down. He finds the right girl, Betty, who is a policeman's daughter. However, in his pursuit of her he is hit by a ca...
